entity.label: Beth-anoth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: House of answers, a city in the mountainous district of Judah (Josh. 15:59). It has been identified with the modern Beit-‘Anun, about 3 miles northeast of Hebron.

nodes.label: Beth-anoth
nodes.description: House of answers, a city in the mountainous district of Judah (Josh. 15:59). It has been identified with the modern Beit-‘Anun, about 3 miles northeast of Hebron.

verses.text: And Maarath, and Bethanoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
